untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external 'guru consensus' data (60% threshold, consensus shift tracking) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The core logic depends on real-time consensus tracking from newsletter writers (Prechter, Zweig, etc.) that cannot be computed from price/technical indicators alone. Translated price_pos_20 as proxy for muted price action, but consensus component is unmeasurable within technical framework.
translation_notes: Entry condition partially translated: price_pos_20 < 0.06 approximates 'price moved <6% in consensus direction over 10 bars' by capturing price near 10-bar range extremes. Exit at >2% move uses price_pos_20 > 0.02 as inverse proxy. The three entry requirements ('60% consensus', 'directional thesis', 'position size') cannot be formalized without external consensus data feed. This rule requires augmentation with a guru_consensus indicator or manual consensus input.
